title: LogEntrySchema
description: Schema for a single structured log entry. All entries are append-only, stored under logs/<run_id>/. sequence_number must be strictly monotonically increasing within a log file.

run_id.description: SHA-256 hex digest identifying the run this log entry belongs to.

sequence_number.description: Monotonically increasing integer starting at 1 within this log file.

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp in RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2026-04-10T23:10:44Z').

phase.description: Phase number (0–5) during which this event occurred.

actor.description: Role or component that generated this log entry.

task_id.description: Task ID if this event is scoped to a specific task; null otherwise.

input_artifacts.description: Paths of artifacts read as inputs for this event.

output_artifacts.description: Paths of artifacts produced as outputs of this event.

details.description: Arbitrary structured details specific to the event type. Must be serialisable as canonical JSON.

checksum.description: Optional checksum chain value: SHA-256(canonical_json(this_entry_without_checksum) || previous_checksum). Hex encoded.
